name: Study Room video search uses pixel sprites (no lucide icons)
description: After TASK B icon migration, verify the Study Room video search uses pixel-art sprites for the search icon and loading spinner. The search input and results should render correctly.

planSteps.description: Log in with test credentials and navigate to /app/study-room.
The Study Room page renders with a video search input visible.
A search icon (sprite image or SVG) is visible near the search input field.
Type 'machine learning' into the video search input and submit.
Either video results appear (thumbnails, titles), or a loading indicator (pixel spinner) is shown during the search, or a message about no results is displayed. No crash or blank screen.
